message:
feat(core): add deterministic trace v2 format and replay canonicalizer

Adds TraceFormatVersion, CanonicalOrdering, TraceEntry with FNV-1a
fingerprints, DeterministicTrace with push/digest, ReplayCanonicalizer
with temporal/domain-grouped/causal ordering, dedup, max_entries,
compare (identical/isomorphic/divergent), diagnose_mismatches, and
v1→v2 upgrade. 43 unit tests. (ft-2p9cb.5.3.1)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
